title: stelis tricula
intro: Stelis tricula, also known as the "Three-horned Stelis," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloid content, which has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis tricula include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing fever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its full range of applications.
